positive: A stylized, abstract minimalist portrait of a cosmic feline lounging on a crescent moon. The cat has a sleek, ethereal silhouette rendered in deep indigo and cosmic violet tones. Its whiskers and tail trail luminous gold dust against a vibrant, gradient nebula background of teal and cyan. Focus on dramatic, high-contrast lines and clean negative space. The style is a blend of celestial art and modern graphic design, giving it a high-fashion, dreamlike poster feel. Composition should be centered and symmetrical, emphasizing the clean lines of the subject against the vibrant, swirling cosmos. Perfect for apparel transfer printing.
negative: blurry, deformed, watermark, signature, text, logo, dirty, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, muted, low contrast, realistic photograph
